div.p: When it comes to the quality of our products, we leave nothing to chance. We attach the utmost importance to high-quality materials and first-class manufacturing and set standards in terms of durability and robustness. Learn more

div.class: ce_text footer-info col col-12 col-lg-3 block
div.p: DUSS is a modern, independent family-owned firm with its roots in the Black Forest at the heart of the Baden-Württemberg region in southwest Germany. It is here that every single DUSS machine is conceived, designed and produced.
